title: The Missing Layer Between Vision and Decision
summary: MACHINE PERCEPTION · PART 2Detection tells you what is in a frame. Decisions require knowing what changed, what it means, and what should happen next. Those are different questions and no detector, however accurate, can answer them.TL;DR — Every real-world vision deployment eventually hits the same wall: the question the business asks is not the question the model answers.
